meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Fix Bugs Fast: Antigravity Project Template for Students
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to debug faster, build confidence, and launch your first student SaaS app.
content.answer_block: If you are stuck debugging, you lack a structured feedback loop. The Antigravity project template forces modularity, while Claude Code acts as an autonomous pair programmer. By combining these, you isolate errors, automate root-cause analysis, and transform complex crashes into simple, actionable code refactors in minutes.
content.intro:
You’ve been staring at a wall of red terminal text for three hours. The cursor blinks mockingly, and the logic that felt so elegant in your head has collapsed into a mountain of spaghetti code. Every student developer hits this wall; the difference between quitting and becoming an engineer is how you navigate the wreckage.

You don't need a computer science degree to fix this—you need a system. By moving from 'guessing' to an 'Antigravity' workflow, you treat your project as a sandbox of isolated components. It’s time to stop fighting the debugger and start commanding your code with intent.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Sandbox
steps.description: Standardize your environment to prevent configuration drift. This ensures that every component is isolated before debugging begins.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project structure with strict modular separation for components and services.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Don't debug the whole app. Use Claude Code to identify the specific function causing the crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current stack trace and identify the single file responsible for the runtime error.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'identify the specific file causing the error in the latest logs'

steps.title: Automated Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Create a test suite that triggers the bug consistently to ensure a permanent fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest unit test that replicates the reported error condition for the identified module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'write a unit test that recreates the bug found in step 2'

steps.title: Apply Logic Patch
steps.description: Use AI to suggest a fix that aligns with your existing architecture patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a refactor for the failing function that handles the edge case identified in the unit test.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'refactor the failing function to handle the edge case'

steps.title: Verify and Validate
steps.description: Run the full test suite to ensure the fix didn't break secondary systems.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full test suite and confirm 100% pass rate for the modified module.

pro_tips: Always commit your code before triggering an AI refactor so you can roll back instantly if the AI hallucinates.
Use 'Explain like I'm a senior engineer' as a prefix in your Claude Code prompts to get more performant, production-ready code.
Debug during the 'low-energy' hours of your day; the AI handles the heavy lifting, allowing you to focus on high-level architecture.
Keep your Antigravity config files in a separate folder to avoid cluttering your business logic.
When a bug persists, ask the AI to 'write a script to log the state of all variables' before the error occurs to get better visibility.
content.next_steps: Once your project is stable, deploy it to a free tier platform like Vercel or Railway to showcase your work in your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs define your progress. Master the tools that turn beginners into ship-ready engineers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
